title: Fix: 엄마한테 오늘 저녁에 늦는다고 문자 보내줘
goal: Command '엄마한테 오늘 저녁에 늦는다고 문자 보내줘' failed with: The communication_helper tool was called without providing the required text and mode parameters, even though both were inferable from the user's command.. Suggestion: Set text to '오늘 저녁에 늦을 것 같아요' and mode to 'sms' (or equivalent), and resolve the recipient '엄마' from contacts before calling the tool.

test_requirements.case: route and execute '엄마한테 오늘 저녁에 늦는다고 문자 보내줘...'

test_command: cd backend && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v
test_focus_command: cd backend && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v
